_observed: Credible Near-Mint Charizard at fair market — this is the listing the picker SHOULD pick. Title has the Pokemon HP stat ('HP 120') which the picker's HP_HEAVILY_PLAYED_PATTERN regex must NOT false-positive on (the gate matches HP-as-heavily-played but not HP-followed-by-a-number, which is always the Pokémon HP stat).
title: Charizard Base Set Shadowless Holo #4/102 NM HP 120 Pokemon Card 1999
